library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: Guardianship document from the court of Daniel b. Azarya, Jerusalem. An unknown person b. Ezra appoints Ishaq b. Abraham to be the guardian and get what his brother left him in his will. (Gil, Kingdom, vol. 2, #216) VMR The second document, ENA NS 44.31 forms the second portion of lines 7 - 18. For the exact location of the tear please see the original text.
